---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.resume-hero-section}

:::: {.resume-hero-header}
::: {.resume-hero-photo-wrap}
![](assets/kevin-mackay.jpg){.resume-hero-photo}
:::

::: {.resume-hero-header-right}
::: {.resume-hero-contact}
[**Kevin Mackay, PhD**]{.resume-hero-name}

[mackaykp@gmail.com](mailto:mackaykp@gmail.com)

Hamilton, ON
:::

::: {.resume-tagline-card}
::: {.resume-tagline}
Understanding [systems]{.resume-tagline-em} through data and research

:::
:::
:::
::::

::: {.resume-hero-divider}
:::

:::: {.resume-intro-row}
::: {.resume-cred}
::: {.resume-cred-item}
**Core Capabilities**

- Analytical design and problem framing
- Data quality assessment and governance
- Spatial and non-spatial analysis
- Workflow development and automation
- Evidence-informed decision support

:::

:::

::: {.resume-hero-content}
::: {.resume-hero-text}
**Professional Summary**

I work across the full lifecycle of analytical and research projects in public-sector environments, supporting teams from problem definition and data quality assessment through analysis, communication, and workflow design. My experience spans municipal, federal, and academic settings, where I help organizations strengthen data practice, understand systems, and make informed decisions with confidence.
I have supervised staff, teaching assistants, and student contributors, balancing coaching, accountability, and delivery across teams with varied technical backgrounds and availability.

:::
:::

::::

:::

::: {.resume-jump}
[Experience](#experience) · [Education](#education) · [Skills](#skills)
:::

::: {.resume-body}

## Experience {#experience}

::: {.resume-experience-focus}

::: {.resume-job-card}
### Program Analyst - City of Hamilton (2025-2026)
- Supported policy and program teams by analyzing data quality, documenting assumptions, and developing QA guidance to strengthen program oversight and evidence-informed decision-making.
- Contributed to corporate capacity-building by preparing a business case for analytics and digital skills training, linking emerging tools to long-term organizational capability and efficiency.
:::

::: {.resume-job-card}
### Data Analyst - Statistics Canada, Innovation Secretariat (2023-2025)
- Analyzed administrative and survey data to support program monitoring, performance measurement, and spatial analysis.
- Coordinated workflows in a secure data environment, supporting data access, documentation, and compliance.
- Advised internal stakeholders on data limitations, methodological trade-offs, and appropriate interpretation of analytical results.
:::

::: {.resume-job-card}
### Research Coordinator - McMaster University (2021-2023)
- Supervised a mixed team of approximately 8 staff and student contributors, assigning work, coaching development, and supporting role clarity across projects.
- Coordinated research activities across multiple analytics initiatives, supporting planning, task tracking, and cross-functional collaboration.
- Analyzed large administrative and spatial datasets to support segmentation, outreach planning, and evidence-informed service delivery.
- Managed concurrent research requests from intake through delivery, tracking scope, schedules, milestones, and risks across full-time and part-time contributors.
- Coordinated cross-functional collaboration between research teams and external partners with different objectives, timelines, and communication needs.
- Supported ethical and procedural compliance by maintaining documentation and reinforcing standards across projects.
:::

::: {.resume-job-card}
### Sessional Lecturer - University of Toronto (2020-2021)
- Delivered hands-on training in applied data analysis and spatial data science.
- Developed course materials, assignments, and tutorials to support skill development and tool adoption across diverse audiences.
- Supervised teaching assistants, coordinated lab and office-hour delivery, and reinforced instructional consistency across course sections.
:::

::: {.resume-job-card}
### Doctoral Researcher - McMaster University (2013-2020)
- Conducted spatial and analytical research to support public policy and program analysis.
- Led a Google Street View-based project from design through implementation, producing a public-facing digital resource with over 8 million views.
- Facilitated tutorials, coached students through lab assignments using guided questioning, and provided office-hour support to strengthen applied analytical skills.
:::

:::

::: {.resume-education}
## Education {#education}

::: {.resume-education-focus}

::: {.resume-nested-card}
- **PhD in Geography**, McMaster University (2020)  
- **Master of Spatial Analysis**, Toronto Metropolitan University (2013)  
- **Honours Geography & Environmental Studies (Minor in GIS)**, McMaster University (2012)
:::

:::

:::

::: {.resume-skills}
## Skills {#skills}

::: {.resume-skills-focus}

::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Data & Spatial Analysis**

::: {.resume-skill-tags}
[R]{.resume-skill-tag} [Python]{.resume-skill-tag} [SQL]{.resume-skill-tag} [ArcGIS]{.resume-skill-tag} [spatial modelling]{.resume-skill-tag} [administrative data]{.resume-skill-tag}
:::

:::

::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Research & Evaluation**

::: {.resume-skill-tags}
[mixed methods]{.resume-skill-tag} [evidence synthesis]{.resume-skill-tag} [policy analysis]{.resume-skill-tag}
:::

:::

::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Data Quality & Governance**

::: {.resume-skill-tags}
[validation]{.resume-skill-tag} [documentation]{.resume-skill-tag} [reproducibility]{.resume-skill-tag} [workflow design]{.resume-skill-tag}
:::

:::

::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Project Coordination**

::: {.resume-skill-tags}
[planning]{.resume-skill-tag} [task tracking]{.resume-skill-tag} [stakeholder engagement]{.resume-skill-tag} [cross-functional collaboration]{.resume-skill-tag}
[people supervision]{.resume-skill-tag} [coaching]{.resume-skill-tag} [team leadership]{.resume-skill-tag}
:::

:::

::: {.resume-nested-card}
**Communication & Enablement**

::: {.resume-skill-tags}
[dashboards]{.resume-skill-tag} [reporting]{.resume-skill-tag} [training]{.resume-skill-tag} [user guides]{.resume-skill-tag} [presentations]{.resume-skill-tag}
:::

:::

:::

:::

:::
